Iranian drone hit RAF base, Cyprus president saysNo casualties were reported and the base sustained "minimal damage", the Ministry of Defence said. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm2r0q310e3o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cm2r0q310e3o#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 10:37:36 GMT
Oil prices jump and shares fall as conflict escalatesExperts have warned that a prolonged conflict could push global energy prices even higher. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75evve6l63o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75evve6l63o#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 09:56:32 GMT
Video appears to show US F-15 fighter jet crashing in KuwaitKuwait's ministry of defence confirmed "several American fighter aircraft came down this morning", with crews "unscathed". https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/ce8wed33e07o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/ce8wed33e07o#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 09:43:33 GMT
Allies of US in the Gulf bear brunt of Iran attacksIran's attacks on Gulf Arab states suggest the Islamic Republic is targeting not just the US military but also civilian infrastructure. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1jk922dgjgo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1jk922dgjgo#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 22:19:03 GMT
Iran's regime is still intact - the coming days will show if it can hold outIran's surviving leaders are in crisis mode, battling to project security as US and Israel strikes continue. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lgvg5rl1o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2lgvg5rl1o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 18:05:06 GMT
UK will allow US to use bases to strike Iranian missile sites, PM saysThe prime minister says it remains the case that the UK will "not join offensive action now". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqj9g11p1ezo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cqj9g11p1ezo#2 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 10:00:38 GMT
Major changes to asylum system set to come into forceFrom Monday, asylum seekers granted refugee status in the UK will be offered only temporary protection. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp32ddzdjxko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp32ddzdjxko#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 22:04:54 GMT
Deadly Texas bar shooting 'potentially act of terrorism', FBI saysTwo people were killed and 14 injured, with the suspected gunman, identified by some media outlets, also shot dead. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjznzgly0po?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjznzgly0po#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 23:17:32 GMT
Scotland becomes first UK country to allow water cremationsThe process - called alkaline hydrolysis - will offer families a third option instead of burial or traditional cremation. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9gkknee0zo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cd9gkknee0zo#2 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 06:10:44 GMT
Michael B Jordan upends Oscars race as Sinners wins big at Actor AwardsThe US star's best actor win for Sinners leaves the Oscars race too close to call. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyzklvk79yo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/clyzklvk79yo#2 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 05:08:35 GMT
